---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## 🤔 Problem or Use Case
Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case this feature would address.

## ✅ Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution for addressing this feature.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

---
**Note**: Please check if a similar feature has already been requested before creating a new issue.
